title: roldana sartorii
intro: Roldana sartorii, also known as Mexican plume or silvery ragweed, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. Traditionally, Roldana sartorii has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. Roldana sartorii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
